outcome.transcript:
[   1.0s] Customer: Hello?
[   9.0s] Kate: Hi, this is Kate calling about your 2025 Jeep Grand Cherokee. Our system has detected that it needs service for maintenance. I'd love to help you get that scheduled at Village Jeep — does that work for you?
[  21.0s] Customer: Yes.
[  24.0s] Kate: Great! We have a few openings. How about Tuesday, May twelfth, at eight thirty in the morning, or Tuesday, May twelfth, at one thirty in the afternoon? We also have Wednesday, May thirteenth, at nine in the morning. Which of those times works best for you?
[  40.0s] Customer: Wednesday at nine.
[  51.0s] Kate: Perfect! I've got you scheduled for Wednesday, May thirteenth, at nine in the...
